'''鈭歵-k-h''' ('''katakah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zotz|zotz]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zotz|zotz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-k-h
|-
! Lemma
| katakah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitakah|thitakah]] || [[word:jitakah|jitakah]] || [[word:shitakah|shitakah]] || [[word:kitakah|kitakah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutakah|thuthutakah]] || [[word:jujutakah|jujutakah]] || [[word:shushutakah|shushutakah]] || [[word:kukutakah|kukutakah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutakah|thutakah]] || [[word:jutakah|jutakah]] || [[word:shutakah|shutakah]] || [[word:kutakah|kutakah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutakah|thutakah]] || [[word:jutakah|jutakah]] || [[word:shutakah|shutakah]] || [[word:kutakah|kutakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetakah|thetakah]] || [[word:jetakah|jetakah]] || [[word:shetakah|shetakah]] || [[word:ketakah|ketakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotakah|thothotakah]] || [[word:jojotakah|jojotakah]] || [[word:shoshotakah|shoshotakah]] || [[word:kokotakah|kokotakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotakah|thotakah]] || [[word:jotakah|jotakah]] || [[word:shotakah|shotakah]] || [[word:kotakah|kotakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotakah|thotakah]] || [[word:jotakah|jotakah]] || [[word:shotakah|shotakah]] || [[word:kotakah|kotakah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:takah|takah]] || [[word:takah|takah]] || [[word:takah|takah]] || [[word:takah|takah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:takah|takah]] || [[word:takah|takah]] || [[word:takah|takah]] || [[word:takah|takah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:takah|takah]] || [[word:takah|takah]] || [[word:takah|takah]] || [[word:takah|takah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:takah|takah]] || [[word:takah|takah]] || [[word:takah|takah]] || [[word:takah|takah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙takah|th忙takah]] || [[word:j忙takah|j忙takah]] || [[word:sh忙takah|sh忙takah]] || [[word:k忙takah|k忙takah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatakah|thathatakah]] || [[word:jajatakah|jajatakah]] || [[word:shashatakah|shashatakah]] || [[word:kakatakah|kakatakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatakah|thatakah]] || [[word:jatakah|jatakah]] || [[word:shatakah|shatakah]] || [[word:katakah|katakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatakah|thatakah]] || [[word:jatakah|jatakah]] || [[word:shatakah|shatakah]] || [[word:katakah|katakah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatakah|shatakah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatakah|goshatakah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatakah|gokishatakah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatakahn眉|shatakahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatakahnkn眉|goshatakahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakahn眉|gokishatakahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatakahsh毛|shatakahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatakahnksh毛|goshatakahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatakahsh毛|gokishatakahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakahro|shatakahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakahnkro|goshatakahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakahro|gokishatakahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakahmu|shatakahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakahnkmu|goshatakahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakahmu|gokishatakahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatakahsher|shatakahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatakahnksher|goshatakahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatakahsher|gokishatakahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatakahng|shatakahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatakahnkng|goshatakahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatakahng|gokishatakahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatakahya|shatakahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatakahnkya|goshatakahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatakahya|gokishatakahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatakahyam|shatakahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatakahnkyam|goshatakahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatakahyam|gokishatakahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatakahn眉sh毛|shatakahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatakahnkn眉sh毛|goshatakahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatakahn眉sh毛|gokishatakahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakahn眉ro|shatakahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakahnkn眉ro|goshatakahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakahn眉ro|gokishatakahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakahn眉mu|shatakahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakahnkn眉mu|goshatakahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakahn眉mu|gokishatakahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatakahsh毛n眉|shatakahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatakahnksh毛n眉|goshatakahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakahsh毛n眉|gokishatakahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakahsh毛ro|shatakahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakahnksh毛ro|goshatakahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakahsh毛ro|gokishatakahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakahsh毛mu|shatakahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakahnksh毛mu|goshatakahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakahsh毛mu|gokishatakahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatakahron眉|shatakahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatakahnkron眉|goshatakahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakahron眉|gokishatakahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatakahrosh毛|shatakahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatakahnkrosh毛|goshatakahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatakahrosh毛|gokishatakahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakahromu|shatakahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakahnkromu|goshatakahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakahromu|gokishatakahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatakahmun眉|shatakahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatakahnkmun眉|goshatakahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakahmun眉|gokishatakahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatakahmush毛|shatakahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatakahnkmush毛|goshatakahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatakahmush毛|gokishatakahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakahmuro|shatakahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakahnkmuro|goshatakahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakahmuro|gokishatakahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
